Our manifesto

We believe in holistic disciplines.
Not in the marketing around them.

A platform that's honest with those who practice and those who receive. No hype, no impossible promises, always verified credentials.

What we are

A marketplace that respects practitioners and clients.

  • Holistic practitioners with verified qualifications from schools and professional associations
  • Every discipline explained with honesty: what it does, what it doesn't
  • Prices always visible
  • A real person for every session - never a bot
  • Intro call free (~15 min), no commitment
What we are NOT

We don't sell over-promises or shortcuts.

  • An app that promises results in 7 days
  • Empty phrases like "unlock your potential"
  • Bots instead of a real practitioner
  • Profiles without verifiable credentials
  • Prices hidden until checkout
When can a holistic path help you?

The right path for what you're going through.

Times of tension, phases of transition, moments when you're seeking more awareness: whatever your story, it deserves attention. Our verified holistic practitioners work with different approaches - choose the one that resonates with you. For clinical conditions, talk to a doctor or psychologist first.

Explore the disciplines
✓ Tension and overload ✓ Need for a break ✓ Family dynamics ✓ Life transitions ✓ Difficult choices ✓ Recurring patterns ✓ Seeking awareness ✓ Everyday wellbeing ✓ Complementary support - Not a substitute for medical care - Not clinical psychotherapy - For clinical symptoms, talk to a doctor
How it works

Three steps. No phone calls.

No 30-minute questionnaires or 24-hour confirmation emails. You find, book, and do the session straight from the app.

1 Choose

Choose the discipline

11 disciplines, 4 languages, profiles with verified credentials. Filter by language, price and availability today.

2 Book

Book and get confirmation

Secure Stripe payment. Instant confirmation with a video link built into the platform, plus a message with your chosen practitioner. Reschedule or cancel up to 24h before.

Sara Conti In sessione · 38:24
3 Session

Do the session from home

Video call built into the app. No Zoom to set up.

The 11 disciplines

Every discipline, explained properly.

For each one we say what it does, what it doesn't do, and who it might help. No hype, just honesty.

First session
01 / 11

ThetaHealing®

A deep-relaxation technique based on theta brain waves. It works on the level of personal awareness. It does not replace professional psychological support.

Explore the discipline

Who it's for

  • Recurring emotional patterns
  • Limiting beliefs about yourself
  • Those seeking a first holistic approach

Who it's NOT for

  • Clinical diagnoses or psychiatric disorders
  • Those expecting results in 1 session
 Most booked
02 / 11

Reiki

An energy practice for relaxation. Limited studies on effects on perceived stress. Always complementary to medical care.

Explore the discipline

Who it's for

  • Periods of strong tension and fatigue
  • Support for rest after difficult periods
  • Those seeking a light-touch practice

Who it's NOT for

  • Treatment of medical conditions
  • Those seeking rigorous experimental proof
03 / 11

Astrology

A birth-chart reading for self-understanding. An interpretive tool, not a predictive one. Zero prophecy.

Explore the discipline
04 / 11

Human Design

An energy map drawn from I Ching, astrology and chakras. An interpretive framework, not science. For life choices.

Explore the discipline
05 / 11

Numerology

The symbolism of numbers tied to name and date. Personal reflection. It doesn't predict the future. Serious, not magical.

Explore the discipline
06 / 11

Ayurveda

Traditional Indian medicine. Doshas, nutrition, lifestyle. Mixed evidence. Complementary to medicine.

Explore the discipline
07 / 11

Naturopathy

Prevention through nutrition, phytotherapy, lifestyle. Regulated as a bio-natural practice. Always alongside a doctor.

Explore the discipline
Deep path
08 / 11

Family Constellation

Dynamics inherited from the family system. The Hellinger method. For recurring patterns in relationships.

Explore the discipline

Who it's for

  • Recurring patterns in relationships
  • Unresolved family dynamics
  • Those who've already done psychological work

Who it's NOT for

  • A first holistic approach (it's intense)
  • Those looking for a "light" session
09 / 11

Systemic Constellation

An extension into professional and organizational contexts. For teams, complex decisions, company patterns.

Explore the discipline
10 / 11

Shamanism

A guided journey with drum, breath and archetypal imagery. For reconnection, recovering parts of yourself, symbolic understanding. It's neither religion nor psychotherapy.

Explore the discipline

Who it's for

  • Those who feel they've lost a part of themselves after a hard event
  • A deep distance from nature and its cycles
  • Those seeking a concrete, non-religious spiritual practice

Who it's NOT for

  • Clinical diagnoses, severe trauma, addictions
  • Those looking for divination or predictions
11 / 11

SEED – Energy Process®

An energy practice of inner awakening from the SEED Academy. Realignment with your soul and your mission. Personal and spiritual growth, not psychotherapy or medical treatment.

Explore the discipline

Who it's for

  • Emotional blocks and repeating patterns
  • A search for clarity, direction and purpose
  • Those seeking deep energy work

Who it's NOT for

  • Clinical diagnoses or psychiatric disorders
  • Those seeking medical or psychological treatment
Inside the platform

Everything in one place.

Search for a practitioner, read verified credentials, book a time. All from the browser - on mobile, tablet or desktop. Zero Zoom, zero back-and-forth emails, zero installs.

Smart searchFilter by discipline, language, price and availability today.
One calendarTimes updated in real time. No back-and-forth emails.
Built-in video callOpen, press start. Simple, secure booking.
Clear prices, zero strings attached

How much does it cost to start a holistic path?

Your path starts with a free ~15-minute intro call over video - to see whether it's the right path for you, before booking an actual session. If you choose to continue, the price varies by discipline and chosen practitioner and is always visible before booking. Zero subscriptions, you only pay for what you do.

Powered by
Intro call FREE
Available plans

You only pay for what you do.

~15 min over video

  • No commitment, no card

  • Brief notes at the end of the session

−10%

Private beta reviews

Words from users.

Reviews collected during the private beta with our first users. Every review is verified after a completed, paid session.

"I appreciated the clarity. They told me right away what ThetaHealing® can and can't do. The free intro call helped me understand it was right for me."
Giulia M.Milano · ThetaHealing®
Verified
"I was looking for a serious platform for Reiki, not an app that promises miracles. Here they put certified practitioners front and center, no marketing fluff."
Roberto D.Roma · Reiki
Verified
"Skeptical at first. After 3 Constellation sessions I understood a recurring pattern that still helps me. A well-prepared practitioner, honest prices, easy cancellation."
Elena P.Bologna · Costellazioni
Verified
FAQ

Things you actually ask us.

When you create your account we ask you 6 questions in ~3 minutes and suggest 3 practitioners and 3 practices that fit you. Then you can book a free ~15-minute intro call straight from the practitioner's profile - without paying anything, without a credit card. An introductory chat to see if there's a good fit, not a full session. If it wasn't useful, we stop there - no questions, no pressure.

It depends on the discipline. Reiki and Ayurveda have mixed clinical studies. ThetaHealing®, Human Design, Astrology and Numerology are interpretive frameworks, not science. Naturopathy is regulated as a bio-natural practice.

No. They're always complementary, never alternatives. We say so on every page. If you have clinical symptoms, consult a licensed doctor or psychologist first.

ID document, training certificate (ThetaHealing® Institute, IRHC Reiki, SIAF, etc.), minimum 2 years of documented practice, video interview with our team.

  • At least 48h before the session: full refund.
  • Between 24h and 48h before: 50% refund.
  • Less than 24h before: no refund, the time stays reserved for you.
  • Cancellations made by the practitioner always include a full refund.

The cost varies from practitioner to practitioner. There's no fixed price since each practitioner sets their own rate, but prices start from a minimum of €35.

Many practitioners offer a free first intro consultation. The length varies: some offer 15 minutes, others 30. Check the practitioner's profile to see if it's available and for how long.

What happens next

Zero surprises. 3 simple steps.

~1 minute

Create your account

Email + password. No credit card, no commitment.

~3 minutes

6 questions to personalize

What you're looking for, what you want to work on, when you want to start. Answers saved - come back whenever you like.

Right away

3 practitioners + 3 tailored practices

Automatic selection from your answers. Verified profiles, reviews, clear prices.

When you find the right one, you book the free intro call straight from their profile. No credit card.

Create your account, answer 6 questions, instantly see 3 practitioners who fit you. No credit card, no commitment.

Holistic Unity

Marketplace of verified holistic practitioners (Italian Law 4/2013). ThetaHealing®, Reiki, Astrology, Human Design, Numerology, Ayurveda, Naturopathy, Constellations. Storm X Digital S.R.L.

Legal

Privacy Policy Cookie Policy Client terms Practitioner terms

The holistic practices offered by practitioners under Italian Law 4/2013 are bio-natural wellbeing practices - they are not healthcare services and do not replace medical, psychological or nutritional advice, diagnosis or treatment. For clinical symptoms, consult a licensed healthcare professional.
